_comment: Live loop state. The PM updates this at the end of every tick. Survives context resets.
_paused_note: Set paused:true to make the loop go straight back to sleep without doing work. The kill switch — the user can stop the team without stopping the loop itself.
_escalations_note: Tasks the quality loop could not pass within its round budget. The PM must surface these to the user rather than let them silently look done.
_state_reason: 2026-07-17 18:15 (tick 47): PROJECT SWITCH. Director paused Life Town and started touchRPG, reusing the same team+system unchanged. BLOCKED ON: the director's concept brief — asked on Discord (4 questions: genre/touch meaning, one-line concept, target player, references). The name 'touchRPG' is NOT a brief; per VISION section 2/4 the PM must NOT invent the concept, genre, or target player. WHEN THE BRIEF LANDS: fill VISION section 2, open T001 (explore, planner, 기획팀장 rubric from VISION section 3.2 verbatim, passMark 90) via quality-loop, send proposed scope to director for approval. LIFE TOWN RESUME: restore section 2 + backlog from lifetown/docs/paused-state/, point loop.json.project back; it stopped with 7 buildings + village v2 gate-green, awaiting a lock-or-gameplay decision.
